name: codex-team-router
description: Route coding tasks before deciding main-thread or Codex native subagent execution.

interface.shortDescription: Route coding tasks before deciding main-thread or visible subagent execution.
interface.longDescription: Codex Team Router provides task routing, model profiles, optional lifecycle hooks, run-state tracking, and validation gates before choosing main-thread execution or Codex-native planner, executor, reviewer, explorer, and verifier workflows.
defaultPrompt: Route this coding task before implementing
Use planner/executor/reviewer subagents for this task
Run a high-risk team-router workflow with native subagents
